sentence_reviews.text: Red teaming uses threat models and adversarial operators to discover harmful capabilities, unsafe interactions, and bypasses before and after release.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NIST AI RMF covers red-teaming, adversarial testing, threat/risk identification, monitoring, and evaluation governance; ReAct supports reasoning/acting agent loops as a behavior substrate for agent-focused tests.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support the main technical relationship, but the wording combines atlas taxonomy terms rather than a single quoted source claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial robustness & security testing, Observe–plan–act agent loops.
